geographic_scope: Ilhéus, BA, Brazil (R. Cel. Paiva, 46, Centro, Ilhéus - BA, 45653-310) to San Francisco, CA, USA (1423 Hayes St, San Francisco, CA 94117)
notes: All shipments entering the commerce of the U.S. are subject to U.S. Customs inspection and exams.
Exams occur at the discretion of U.S. Customs and are not negotiable if deemed necessary.
All exam charges will be billed at cost with an additional handling charge of $125.00 per exam.
A Surety Bond is required for all customs entries. Bond rates are for standard cargo only.
If clearance through another governmental agency (e.g., FDA, EPA, USDA) is required, bond rate is $6.00/$1,000 of duty plus 3 times the value with a $100.00 minimum.
